differential_diagnoses: Adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
next_steps: Perform a thorough suicide and violence risk assessment
Increase sertraline dosage to an evidence-based range for OCD treatment
Initiate Cognitive Behavioral Therapy with Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP)
Educate the patient and family on the ego-dystonic nature of intrusive thoughts in postpartum OCD
Provide psychoeducation to reduce shame and fear regarding infant safety
Implement a safety plan involving family supervision of infant care to ensure security without undermining maternal bonding
Continue monitoring blood pressure for hypertensive disorder recovery
